results.title: 'Justice will be served': Palace vows to enforce Bato arrest warrant
results.description: MANILA, Philippines — Malacañang on Thursday vowed that justice would be served, as the Department of Justice (DOJ) announced that the arrest warrant issued against Sen. Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa by the International Criminal Court (ICC) may now be enforced. Earlier, the DOJ also stated it had tasked the Philippine National Police (PNP) and the [...]... Keep on reading: 'Justice will be served': Palace vows to enforce Bato arrest warrant

results.title: Minister: Canada's expanded embassy sign of strengthened bond with Estonia
results.description: The opening of Canada's expanded embassy in Tallinn is proof of that country's commitment to the security of Estonia and the other two Baltic states, Minister of Foreign Affairs Margus Tsahkna (Eesti 200) said.

results.title: Paris Mayor promises a 'right to beauty' in all neighbourhoods
results.description: Newly elected Paris mayor Emmanuel Grégoire has unveiled his plans to increase pedestrian areas and improve safety, as well as beautify up to 1,000 'blackspots' in the city.
